commands.name: lint
commands.description: Validate a root Ghost fingerprint package, split fingerprint artifacts, checks, or direct markdown — defaults to .ghost
commands.summary: Validate a fingerprint package or artifact.

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

options.name: all
options.description: Validate every nested fingerprint package and its resolved fingerprint stack

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create a root .ghost split fingerprint package

options.name: scope
options.description: Create a scoped <path>/.ghost fingerprint package

options.name: package
options.description: Exact fingerprint package directory to initialize

options.name: reference
options.description: Reference UI registry, library path, or fingerprint to record in inventory building blocks

options.name: monorepo
options.description: Detect monorepo child package roots and propose scoped Ghost packages

options.name: apply
options.description: With --monorepo, create detected child scoped packages

options.name: force
options.description: Overwrite existing Ghost fingerprint files

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Verify a root Ghost fingerprint package: intent/composition evidence, inventory exemplars, and checks are grounded.
commands.summary: Verify evidence, exemplar paths, and typed refs.

options.name: root
options.description: Optional target root used to resolve fingerprint evidence and exemplar paths (default: cwd)

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

options.name: all
options.description: Verify every nested fingerprint package and its resolved fingerprint stack

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Report sparse fingerprint package contribution facets: intent, inventory, composition, and the next BYOA step.

options.name: includeNested
options.description: Also list nested fingerprint packages and contribution state

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: signals
commands.description: Emit deterministic raw repo signals as JSON: package manifests, language histogram, candidate config files, registry presence, top-level tree, and git remote.
commands.summary: Emit raw repo signals for fingerprint authoring.

commands.name: emit
commands.description: Emit a derived artifact from the fingerprint package (review-command).

options.name: path
options.description: Resolve a nested fingerprint stack for this repo path

options.name: package
options.description: Use exactly this fingerprint package directory instead of resolving a stack

options.name: out
options.description: Output path (review-command → .claude/commands/design-review.md)

options.name: stdout
options.description: Write to stdout instead of a file

commands.name: compare
commands.description: Compare two or more fingerprints or root .ghost bundles. N=2 returns a pairwise delta; N≥3 returns a composite fingerprint.

options.name: semantic
options.description: Qualitative diff of decisions + palette (N=2 only)

options.name: temporal
options.description: Add velocity, trajectory, and ack bounds (N=2, reads .ghost/history.jsonl)

options.name: historyDir
options.description: Directory containing .ghost/history.jsonl (for --temporal, defaults to cwd)

options.name: gate
options.description: Reconcile against a sync manifest and emit a structured pass/fail verdict (N=2 only)

options.name: sync
options.description: Sync manifest path for --gate (default: ./.ghost-sync.json)

options.name: maxDivergenceDays
options.description: For --gate: flag diverging dimensions older than this many days as uncovered

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: ack
commands.description: Acknowledge current drift — record intentional stance toward the tracked fingerprint

options.name: config
options.description: Path to ghost config file

options.name: dimension
options.description: Acknowledge a specific dimension only

options.name: stance
options.description: Stance: aligned, accepted, or diverging

options.name: reason
options.description: Reason for this acknowledgment

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: track
commands.description: Track another fingerprint as this repo's reference

options.name: dimension
options.description: Track only for a specific dimension

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: diverge
commands.description: Declare intentional divergence on a dimension
commands.summary: Declare intentional divergence on a dimension.

options.name: config
options.description: Path to ghost config file

options.name: reason
options.description: Why this dimension is intentionally diverging

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: drift
commands.description: Inspect Ghost drift status or run the stance-ledger check.
commands.summary: Run the continuous design-loop drift check.

options.name: package
options.description: Exact fingerprint package directory

options.name: config
options.description: Path to ghost config file for tracked source

options.name: local
options.description: Local fingerprint or bundle to check

options.name: tracked
options.description: Tracked/reference fingerprint or bundle

options.name: sync
options.description: Sync manifest path (default: ./.ghost-sync.json)

options.name: maxDivergenceDays
options.description: Flag diverging dimensions older than this many days as uncovered

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: markdown or json

commands.name: gather
commands.description: Gather the composed context slice for a surface (the right context at the right time).
commands.summary: Gather the composed context slice for a surface.

options.name: package
options.description: Use this fingerprint package directory (default: ./.ghost)

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: markdown or json

commands.name: checks
commands.description: Select the markdown checks (ghost.check/v1) relevant to the named surfaces.
commands.summary: Select and ground the checks relevant to a diff, by surface.

options.name: surface
options.description: Surface id(s) the change touches (comma-separated or repeated). The agent names them.

options.name: package
options.description: Use this fingerprint package directory (default: ./.ghost)

options.name: grounding
options.description: Omit fingerprint grounding (why / what) and emit only the relevant checks

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: markdown or json

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Migrate a legacy .ghost/ package onto the surface model (surfaces.yml + surface: placement).
commands.summary: Migrate a legacy .ghost/ package onto the surface model.

options.name: dryRun
options.description: Print the migration plan and report; write nothing

options.name: force
options.description: Overwrite existing facet files with the migrated form

options.name: format
options.description: Report format: cli or json

commands.name: skill
commands.description: Install the unified Ghost skill bundle.

options.name: dest
options.description: Install destination (default: detected agent skills directory + /ghost)

options.name: agent
options.description: Agent destination to use when --dest is omitted: claude, cursor, codex, opencode

options.name: force
options.description: Overwrite an existing installed Ghost skill

commands.name: review
commands.description: Emit an evidence-routed advisory review prompt from the fingerprint package and a git diff.
commands.summary: Emit an advisory packet from fingerprint facets and a diff.

options.name: base
options.description: Git ref to diff against (default: HEAD)

options.name: diff
options.description: Unified diff file to embed in the review instead of running git diff. Use '-' for stdin.

options.name: surface
options.description: Surface id(s) the change touches (comma-separated or repeated). The agent names them.

options.name: package
options.description: Exact fingerprint package directory; bypasses stack discovery

options.name: maxDiffBytes
options.description: Maximum diff bytes to include in the review packet (default: 200000)

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: markdown or json
